case_title: PRUDENTIAL OVERALL SUPPLY, A CALIFORNIA CORP. VS. THE GARAGE, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED, LIABILITY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-07-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-07-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRUDENTIAL OVERALL SUPPLY, A CALIFORNIA CORP.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-07-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PRUDENTIAL OVERALL SUPPLY, A CALIFORNIA CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE GARAGE, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED, LIABILITY CO. DBA MCKENZIE'S BAR, AGENT DANNY CHAN $2,020.64 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,160.64, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,020.64 FILED BY PRUDENTIAL OVERALL SUPPLY, A CALIFORNIA CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT THE GARAGE, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED, LIABILITY CO. DBA MCKENZIE'S BAR, AGENT DANNY CHAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-07-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 90.00 - WITH DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE - SERVED MAY-08-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT THE GARAGE, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED, LIABILITY CO. DBA MCKENZIE'S BAR, AGENT DANNY CHAN
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $36.28 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT THE GARAGE, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED, LIABILITY CO. DBA MCKENZIE'S BAR, AGENT DANNY CHAN
